phase: Phase 5 — CMS, Site Publish, Articles on Homepage

architecture.public_site: Served from site_snapshot table (pre-rendered HTML). Zero DB calls on page load.
architecture.publish_flow: Admin edits content -> saved to site_content -> click Publish -> renderPublicHTML() runs -> saved to site_snapshot -> live instantly
architecture.fallback: If no snapshot exists, renders on-the-fly from site_content

new_features.cms_editor: Each section has add/edit/delete/reorder items with image picker (R2 key or URL)
new_features.publish_button: Dashboard Publish Site Live button — renders and saves full snapshot
new_features.articles_homepage: Latest 3 published articles shown in section above contact form
new_features.articles_index: GET /articles — styled index page listing all published articles
new_features.articles_nav: Nav menu now includes Articles link
new_features.contact_editor: Full contact/branding editor: phone, hero title/sub/image, stats, company name, license, areas

routes_added: GET /articles/{slug} — individual article page (already existed, now reads contact from D1)

how_to_use.edit_content: Admin -> Services/Projects/Reviews/Process/Contact tabs -> edit items -> Save Draft or Save+Publish Live
how_to_use.add_images: Admin -> Media tab -> upload image -> copy R2 key -> paste into image field
how_to_use.add_articles: Admin -> Articles tab -> New Article -> fill in -> check Publish -> Save
how_to_use.publish_site: Admin -> Dashboard -> Publish Site Live button (or use Save+Publish from any CMS tab)
how_to_use.articles_appear: On homepage after publishing (latest 3), and at /articles index

remaining_work.github_action: No auto-deploy on git push yet — still requires wrangler from bash_tool with API token
remaining_work.email_notifications: No email on new lead/callback yet
remaining_work.voice_recorder: Audio upload works via media library but no in-browser recorder widget yet
remaining_work.admin_auth: Password is hardcoded 'demo' — no per-user accounts
